prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约11614名→9620名→6238名→5019名→4096名，呈持续快速上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计提升约7500名 ，年均提升约1500名；2025年基准位次约4096名，较2024年再提升约923名，竞争强度持续加剧；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年50人、2022年50人、202 3年35人、2024年25人、2025年31人；2026年计划扩至50人，较2025年增加19人（增幅约61.3%），为近5年最大扩招幅度，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026 年声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及师德师风类舆情），但非直接影响录取位次的投档异常信号；抖音学校热度总排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高 涨；历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；依托复旦大学整体学科实力，医学相关学科评估：临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A、生 物学A+、基础医学A，A类学科密集，医学学科综合实力位居全国前列；复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第5名，属全国顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业持续高热推荐（2024年，推荐率65%），护理学专 业为推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度居高不下；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约17424人（增幅约35.4%）， 考生规模大幅增长加剧整体竞争；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，对本市考生具有天然地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续快速上升趋势、2026年大幅扩招61.3%（缓解竞争）、考生总数增长35.4%（加剧竞争）、临床医学等专业持续高 热、抖音关注度极高，扩招幅度大于考生增长幅度但位次上升惯性强劲，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年4096名基础上继续提升（位次数字减小），但扩招效应使提升幅度放缓；预测最低位次约5502名，区间5002–6002名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、药学产教融合班）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含护理学卓越班）
- 公共事业管理（含拔尖班、菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5002–6002名内，建议以二档专业（药学/预防医学）为主攻方向、一档临床医学八年制为冲刺目标、三档护理学/公共事业管理为保底选择；位次明显优于区间下 限（<5002名）可重点冲刺一档临床医学八年制；位次接近区间上限（>6002名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were approximately 11614 → 9620 → 6238 → 5019 → 4096, showing a continuous and rapid upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative increase of about 7500 places over the past 5 years, an average annual increase of about 1500 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4096, an increase of about 923 places compared to 2024, with intensifying competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai for comprehensive subjects: 50 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan expands to 50, an increase of 19 places (about 61.3%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past 5 years, significantly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative (mainly involving teacher ethics and style public opinion), but it is not an abnormal signal for admission file submission that directly affects ranking; Douyin university popularity ranks 4th overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention; no obvious file submission interruption signals have been seen in historical abnormal admission records; relying on the overall academic strength of Fudan University, medical-related discipline evaluations: Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, Biology A+, Basic Medicine A, with a dense concentration of A-level disciplines, the comprehensive strength of medical disciplines ranks among the top in the country; Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier national universities, with strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine continues to be highly recommended (2024, recommendation rate 65%), nursing is recommended, and the overall application heat for medical majors remains high; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai for 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 17,424 (about 35.4%) compared to 49,276 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale intensifying overall competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and rapid upward trend in historical rankings, the significant 61.3% expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the 35.4% increase in candidate numbers (intensifying competition), the sustained high heat of clinical medicine and other majors, and extremely high Douyin attention, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, but the strong inertia of ranking increase remains; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to rise (ranking number decreasing) based on the 2025 ranking of 4096, but the expansion effect will slow the increase rate; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5502, with a range of 5002–6002.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Zhengyi Mingdao Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Preventive Medicine (including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (including Nursing Excellence Class)
- Public Service Management (including Top Talent Class, Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5002–6002, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy/Preventive Medicine) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 Nursing/Public Service Management as safety choices; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5002), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>6002), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.
